global.description: The ad features a modern design with bold text and abstract shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new content.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes in a soft red hue, creating a modern and minimalistic background.

elements.label: BingeLayer logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized text logo in black, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, filled circle in a lighter shade of red, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Large, white text that reads 'Stream the hype' with a secondary line in smaller font stating 'New hits every week'.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button in white with bold text saying 'Start now', positioned at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small black text label that reads 'UGC', positioned at the top left corner of the ad.
